Principles of Physics

PHYS132

Fundamentals of Physics for Life Sciences II

4

or PHYS142

Principles of Physics

Please see below for details on the Advanced Program requirements for each specialization area.

1 MATH140 and MATH141 taken together will fulﬁll the Mathematics Supporting Courses requirement; however, MATH135 and MATH136 were designed speciﬁcally for Biological Sciences majors. Students who enter the Biological Sciences major after satisfactorily completing MATH140 should take MATH135 instead of MATH141.

Advanced Program Requirements All Biological Sciences majors must complete an Advanced Program within one of the specialization areas described below. Students must complete a minimum of 27 credits of Advanced Program study.
